title: user — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing user CRUD, self-service /me endpoints, and multi-tenant switching + platform-admin cross-tenant read.

groups.name: tenant-users
groups.description: Admin-facing user CRUD scoped to the active tenant. Every scope-suffixed permission (`.tenant`, `.branch`, `.own`) is resolved by ScopeSuffixResolver at query build time.

routes.description: filter[status], filter[role_id], filter[email_contains], filter[created_after], sort[]=last_login_at, include=profile,memberships
Admin-triggered creation. Body: { email, first_name, last_name, role_slug, send_invitation }. Consumes user_slot entitlement.
Body: { status, default_role_id, preferred_locale }. Profile-side fields go via `PATCH /me/profile` (self) or `PATCH /users/{user}/profile` (admin, gated on profile.update.pii).
Soft-delete. Hard-delete via `POST /{user}/erase` (see below).
Body: { reason, reactivate_at }.
Restore within the erasure hold window.
GDPR Art. 17 erasure. Soft-deletes + schedules PurgeErasedUsersJob.

groups.name: tenant-me
groups.description: Self-service surface for the authenticated User. No admin permission checks — authorization is `subject === auth()->id()`.

routes.description: The bootstrap manifest. Payload: identity, user (this tenant + application), profile, roles, permissions, features, terminology, active_tenant, available_tenants.
Self-update. Allowed fields: preferred_locale. Everything Profile-shaped goes via `/me/profile`.
The caller's own Profile. PII cluster returned unredacted (subject reads their own data).
Body: any of { first_name, last_name, display_name, phone_e164, locale, timezone }. DOB is admin-only — subjects cannot self-mutate their birth date.
Multipart upload. Gated by `avatar_upload` entitlement + tier size cap.
Clears avatar_url. Fires AvatarUpdated. Old S3 object pruned after the 24h grace window by `media::PruneOldAvatar`.
Every TenantMember row the caller holds within the current Application. Includes tenant name, role, is_default, is_staff_only.
Switch active tenant for THIS session. Refused when the caller has no TenantMember row on the target.

groups.name: tenant-users-memberships
groups.description: Admin management of a specific User's multi-tenant memberships.

routes.description: Body: { tenant_id, role_id, is_default, is_staff_only }. Refused when the target tenant's application_id differs from the User's.
Body: { role_id, is_default, is_staff_only }.
Refused when the target is the User's default AND they have no other memberships.

groups.name: platform-users
groups.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling. Writes stay on the tenant surface — platform ops must impersonate an admin (via `access::delegation` in Wave 1b) to write.

routes.description: Cross-tenant filterable list. filter[email_exact], filter[identity_id], filter[application_id], filter[tenant_id], filter[status].
Single-user cross-tenant read. Profile returned redacted unless the operator carries platform.profile.view.pii.
